{{CargoOrgan
|name=Golden Eyelashes
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10868
|idx=75
|description=The resentment of countless snails unable to pass the Mirage finally brewed into a Mirage tear, then flowed into the brains of the dev team!
|skill=
|hp=2300
|def=210
|atk=254
|rush=151
|gene1=In Civilization Mirages, HIT +9%
|gene2=In Civilization Mirages, Dodge +9%
|gene3=In Civilization Mirage, HP Regen +1800 per round
|gene4=In Civilization Mirages, DMG +9%
|gene5=In Civilization Mirage, Lifesteal +30%
|gene7=In Civilization Mirages, DMG +9% (Awakened)
|}}
